title: Sloanea sigun

It belongs to the order Celastrales and the class Magnoliopsida. Sloanea sigun is further classified as a genus within the family Ebenaceae, which is one of the 12 families in the order Celastrales. Within the class Magnoliopsida, Sloanea sigun is classified as a dicotyledonous plant, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves in its seeds.
